title: Farmer's Cutting Collection
description: Adds Farmer's Delight cutting recipes for various mods (a compilation of the Farmer's Cutting datapacks)
body:
Adds more [Farmer's Delight (NeoForge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) or [Farmer's Delight Refabricated (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) cutting board recipes for various mods. This is a single datapack/mod combining all the Farmer's Cutting packs/mods for those who would rather download one file rather than multiple, at the cost of possibly having unusable recipes (that clog the console). - Bark, stripping, recycling for all (applicable) wood types - More dye from one block high flora that give dye - Other cutting recipes depending on mod (refer to the specific Farmer's Cutting pack for more info) ![Wood Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bApGjY4X/images/5ee18d8842874b754f98b0b10bdab3019fe982a6.png) ![Flora Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bApGjY4X/images/908157c414776f5d680e041c4110c6fc8205477f.png) ![Other Cutting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bApGjY4X/images/ef69cfc876bc380182f900398456d4de9a4f7c57.png) All compiled packs are listed and linked to below (actual content depends on minecraft version):
NeoForge Collection - [Farmer's Cutting: The Aether](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-the-aether)
- [Farmer's Cutting: BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-betterend)
- [Farmer's Cutting: BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-betternether)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-biomes-o-plenty)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Eternal Starlight](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-eternal-starlight)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/datapack/natures-spirit)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Nether's Exoticism](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-nethers-exoticism)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-regions-unexplored)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Twilight Forest](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-twilight-forest)
Fabric Collection - [Farmer's Cutting: The Aether](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-the-aether)
- [Farmer's Cutting: BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-betterend)
- [Farmer's Cutting: BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-betternether)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-biomes-o-plenty)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Cinderscapes](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-cinderscapes)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Eternal Starlight](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-eternal-starlight)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/datapack/natures-spirit)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-oh-the-biomes-weve-gone)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Promenade](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-promenade)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Regions Unexplored](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-regions-unexplored)
- [Farmer's Cutting: Terrestria](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farmers-cutting-terrestria)
